item.action: Prevent rollback and stale replay of previously valid evidence promotion decisions with trusted monotonic sequence state.

progress.finding: A same-subject promotion gate still permits replay of an older accepted decision unless the relying system remembers and enforces a monotonic promotion sequence.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime against byte-identical pre-commit files.

item.handoff: Compose R-008 evidence eligibility with R-009 monotonicity in the deployment promotion workflow. Persist next_trusted_state atomically only after the promoted artifact reference is durably recorded; reject concurrent or stale writers rather than resolving by last-write-wins.
